title: coreopsis pubescens var. typica
intro: Coreopsis pubescens var. typica, also known as hairy coreopsis, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of hairy coreopsis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Hairy coreopsis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
